heading: Python Notebook for GLR Poisson
code:
import os
import arcpy
import numpy as np
import pandas as pd
import statsmodels.api as sm
import statsmodels.formula.api as smf

# Current ArcGIS Pro project
aprx = arcpy.mp.ArcGISProject("CURRENT")
# List maps
m = aprx.listMaps()[0]

# Access table
table = m.listTables("la_near_table_v2")[0]
table_path = table.dataSource
workspace = arcpy.Describe(ta

# List of fields
fields = [f.name for f in arcpy.ListFields(table_path)]

# Data to pd
rows = arcpy.da.SearchCursor(table_path, fields)
df = pd.DataFrame(list(rows), columns=fields)

# Incorrect formula
### model_formula = "flow_int ~ C(ORIG_LAD21CD) + orig_pop_log + dest_gdp_log + near_dist_log - 1" 

# Create formula and run glm 
model_formula = "flow_int ~ C(ORIG_LAD21CD) + dest_gdp_log + near_dist_log - 1"
model = smf.glm(formula=model_formula, data=df, family=sm.families.Poisson()).fit()

# Summary
# print(model.summary())

# Predictions
df["gm3"] = model.predict(exog=df)

# Sets path to output (workspace + file name)
#out_table = os.path.join(workspace, "la_near_table_v2_pred.csv")

# Manual export to csv
df.to_csv(r"./la_near_table_v2_pred.csv", index=False)
